rows.description: To Ex Fellows or Exors of Dr H. Rector. Arrears of L. Whittenham Rent. for 1816 & 1817. V. Dil. Book. p. 416 & 249
rows.notes: Amounts '249 14 11 ½' from gpt-5-mini are visually accurate, whereas gemini-flash was incorrect on pounds, shillings, and pence. Description from gemini-flash is significantly more complete and accurate for the text, including 'Dr H.' and the full 'V. Dil. Book. p. 416 & 249' reference. Combined the best numerical value with the best description.
